title: Bull/bear debate ledger (Phase 7, H1)
description: Per-decision debate state produced by the trade-researcher (bull) + trade-skeptic (bear) + risk-and-compliance Gate 6 (facilitator) triple. One file per <TICKER>-<DATE> at ledgers/debate/<TICKER>-<DATE>.yml. The candidate fact ledger at ledgers/candidates/YYYY-MM-DD/<TICKER>.yml is the per-trade source of truth; this debate ledger is a parallel artifact that references it via candidate_ledger_path and shares its reasoning_trace via trace_refs[].

schema_version.description: Debate-ledger schema version. Bump on structural change; existing ledgers stay on the version they were written under.

ticker.description: Uppercase ticker symbol. Matches the candidate ledger's meta.ticker.

date.description: ISO-8601 date of the debate (the day the decision was synthesised). Used in the filename: <TICKER>-<DATE>.yml.

candidate_ledger_path.description: Relative path to the candidate fact ledger this debate references. e.g. ledgers/candidates/2026-05-25/CEG.yml. trace_refs[] integers index into that ledger's reasoning_trace.

debate_mode.description: Debate orchestration mode. v1 commits to single_shot per H1 spec §5; the enum exists so a v2 can flip without a breaking change. multi_turn is NOT implemented in v1.

report_path.description: Path to the trade-researcher Markdown report. e.g. ledgers/candidates/2026-05-25/CEG.md.

thesis_one_sentence.description: One-sentence steelman of the long thesis.

confluence_grade.description: Grade from setup_classification.grade (A+/A/B/C). null when no setup_classification is populated.

trace_refs.description: Integer IDs in the candidate ledger's reasoning_trace that support the bull thesis.

report_path.description: Path to the trade-skeptic Markdown report. e.g. ledgers/candidates/2026-05-25/CEG-bear.md.

verdict.description: Bear's own conviction strength. Distinct from synthesis.verdict (which is the H3 SwingVerdict the facilitator emits).

risk_triggers.description: 3-7 mechanically-testable invalidation conditions per H1 spec §4.

bull_counterpoints.description: Direct engagements with specific bull-report claims.

trace_refs.description: Top-level supporting trace IDs (in the candidate ledger's reasoning_trace) the bear case cites.

condition.description: A condition testable from OHLCV / fundamentals / tool outputs. 'I have a bad feeling' is not a risk trigger.

already_fired.description: Whether this condition is already met at debate time. true → Gate 6 emits REJECT regardless of bull_strength per the edge-case rule in H1 spec §6.

facilitator.description: Subagent that composed the synthesis. Typically 'risk-and-compliance'.

verdict.description: H3 SwingVerdict enum. Replaces the legacy APPROVE / APPROVE-WITH-CONDITIONS / BLOCK trio.

decisive_evidence_trace_refs.description: Subset of the union of bull_case.trace_refs and bear_case.trace_refs that the facilitator considers decisive.

failure_mode.description: Set when the facilitator could not reach a clear stance. e.g. 'balanced_evidence_no_clear_stance' for WATCH_BUILD_THESIS via the balanced-band rule.

tool.description: Tool that wrote this synthesis. Typically 'tools/debate_synthesis.py'.
